teachingPoint: Framer uses variable font system with design tokens. Text variant mapping: primary → fontSize 16, secondary → fontSize 14. Tokens stored in FREEDOM config for runtime customization.
positiveExample: T674 reads FREEDOM config framer.textVariants. Primary variant mapped to fontSize 16. fontSize can be overridden per variant.
negativeExample: Hardcoded fontSize values. No flexibility for design token changes without redeployment.
discriminatingConstraint: Text variant mapping from FREEDOM config. Unknown variants return TextVariantNotFound. ORDER 1 validation.

teachingPoint: Framer component override system: components can be customized with overrides (e.g., font override, color override). Overrides stored as delta from base component. XIIGen normalizes to final resolved style.
positiveExample: T674 reads base component style, then applies overrides in ORDER. Final resolved style stored with override chain recorded for audit.
negativeExample: Ignoring overrides. Exporting base style only, losing customizations.
discriminatingConstraint: Override resolution at ORDER 2. Override chain tracked for audit. Base + overrides = final style.

teachingPoint: Framer animation metadata: text elements may have animation variants. Animation state excluded from storage (animations not portable). Animation metadata recorded in xiigen-unsupported-features for future support.
positiveExample: T674 detects animation on text element, records in xiigen-unsupported-features, stores text without animation data. Audit trail shows animation present but not exported.
negativeExample: Trying to export animation data. Non-standard format, breaks portability.
discriminatingConstraint: Animation metadata excluded from export. Recorded in audit index. Static text exported only.

teachingPoint: Framer workspace isolation: workspaceId must be validated at fabric layer. Multiple workspaces can have same componentName. Query by workspaceId + componentName to prevent cross-workspace collisions.
positiveExample: T674 calls fabric.getComponent(workspaceId, componentName). Fabric validates workspace ownership. Query includes both workspaceId + componentName.
negativeExample: Querying by componentName alone. Same name in multiple workspaces causes collision.
discriminatingConstraint: Workspace validation at fabric layer. Queries include workspaceId predicate. Cross-workspace access forbidden.

description: Text variant mapping via FREEDOM config. Primary/secondary/tertiary variants mapped to canonical font sizes. Runtime customizable without redeployment.
Component override resolution: applies delta-style overrides to base component. Override chain tracked for audit. Final resolved style exportable.
Animation metadata excluded from export for portability. Animations recorded in unsupported-features audit. Static text exported only.
Workspace-scoped component queries prevent name collisions. workspaceId + componentName composite key. Cross-workspace access forbidden via fabric.
